- Experience shipping B2B SaaS products at scale
- Excellent communication & stakeholder management skills
- Track record of turning strategy into measurable results

- Comprehensive health insurance (medical, dental, vision)
- 401(k) matching
- Unlimited PTO

InferenceIO | Boston, MA

---

**About Us:**
InferenceIO is a leading provider of edge AI inference solutions. We're building the next generation of real-time ML deployment platforms.

- Design & implement DL model optimization techniques (quantization, pruning, distillation)

### Perks

• Professional development budget (3k/yr)

QuantumAI is seeking an experienced MLOps Engineer to join our growing ML infrastructure team in our central London office. You'll own the deployment, monitoring, and optimization of machine learning pipelines at scale.

We're looking for someone with 4–6 yrs experience building robust ML systems. You'll:
- Design & maintain CI/CD pipelines for ML models using GitHub Actions / Jenkins
- Manage containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) & orchestration
- Implement monitoring, logging, and observability (Prometheus, ELK Stack)

**Nice to have:**

- ML frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, XGBoost
